methodsAttempted.query: site:biu.ac.il Bar-Ilan University artificial intelligence policy students ChatGPT
methodsAttempted.notes: Public search surfaced official BIU news and course pages plus a Graduate School GenAI guidance PDF.
Hebrew official-domain search mostly surfaced courses, articles, and research/showcase pages rather than policy guidance.

methodsAttempted.query: site:graduate-school.biu.ac.il "Guidance for Appropriate Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence Tools"
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned the official Graduate School landing page and PDF for GenAI guidance.
Robots.txt was checked and did not disallow the official PDF path; direct HTTP fetch returned 200 application/pdf.

artifacts.summary: Discovery verified an official Bar-Ilan Graduate School GenAI guidance PDF. Main-site BIU article access was blocked by CAPTCHA during static fetch and course/news/research pages were not used as claim evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Guidance for Appropriate Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence Tools (GenAI)
Guidance for Appropriate Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence Tools (GenAI) | School of Graduate Studies

artifacts.claimText: Bar-Ilan University guidance leaves whether and how students may use generative AI tools to instructor discretion; if an instructor has not explicitly prohibited use, use is permitted by default when the student explicitly discloses all use.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Guidance for Appropriate Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence Tools (GenAI)
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Bar-Ilan leaves to the full discretion of instructors the decision on whether to allow the use of GenAI tools and the extent to which such use is permitted. If an instructor has not explicitly prohibited the use of generative AI tools, its usage shall be, by default, permitted, provided the student has explicitly disclosed all manners of use.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Instructor discretion controls whether and how GenAI is allowed; absent an explicit prohibition, use is default-permitted if disclosed.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Guidance for Appropriate Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence Tools (GenAI)
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Content created through the use of artificial intelligence must undergo editing and self-scrutiny by the student to verify its accuracy and suitability to academic requirements. Students submitting such work are responsible for all its content, including errors introduced by AI hallucination or inaccuracy.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Students must edit/check AI-created content and remain responsible for errors, including hallucinations.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Guidance for Appropriate Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence Tools (GenAI)
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Privacy protection: It is imperative to refrain from disclosing and sharing personal or sensitive information to generative AI platforms. They are to be used in a manner that respects the privacy of all involved. Attached is Bar-Ilan University’s privacy protection policy: https://ict.biu.ac.il/Privacyprotection Data security: Generative AI tools must adhere to Bar-Ilan’s data security guidelines, as specified in the data security policy documents:
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guidance bars sharing personal/sensitive information with GenAI platforms and applies BIU data-security guidance to GenAI tools.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Guidelines B. Ethical usage, Privacy protection and Data security

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow claim from the official Graduate School GenAI guidance PDF; not promoted as human reviewed or canonical.
Approved because the source explicitly says students are required to declare GenAI use and elaborate the contribution.
Approved because the source directly ties prohibited GenAI use to the Bar-Ilan disciplinary code and academic-integrity treatment.
Approved because the source directly assigns responsibility for AI-created submitted content to students.
Approved because the source directly addresses sensitive information and data security guidelines for GenAI tools.

artifacts.title: Bar-Ilan University GenAI guidance staged claims
artifacts.summary: This staged run verified an official Bar-Ilan University School of Graduate Studies PDF on appropriate use of generative AI tools. Claims are limited to instructor discretion/default permission with disclosure, mandatory declaration, disciplinary treatment, student responsibility, and privacy/data-security handling stated in that PDF.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The official BIU news article discovered during search was blocked by a CAPTCHA during direct fetch and was not used as evidence.
No claim is made that the guidance is the entire university policy landscape or that course-specific instructor rules cannot vary.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
